lens.description: the single lens this critic applied

status.description: sentinel — a successfully completed critic MUST emit 'complete'

evidence_kind.description: artifact-quote = 'quote' is a verbatim substring of the artifact (gets quote-existence checked, dropped if not found); artifact-absence = a finding about something MISSING, 'quote' is a nearby anchor line that IS in the artifact (judged by the verifier, NOT substring-dropped); external-source = prior-art/web finding, 'quote' is the external source/URL (not substring-checked)

quote.description: artifact-quote: the exact substring from the artifact. artifact-absence: a nearby anchor line that exists in the artifact, for context. external-source: the source name/URL.

highest_leverage.description: the single highest-leverage change for this lens
